summary: Frontend-only iteration 7 verified. Hero video swap, new Owner (Patrick) section, Socials band, header brand update, section title/order changes and footer/contact social-icon removal all confirmed working. Aesthetic verdicts included.

verified_checks.hero_video_playback_note: In headless Chromium readyState=0 at probe time (autoplay can be deferred in headless), but poster renders correctly and shows the new high-quality studio screen imagery on the hero. Tag attrs are correct (autoPlay, muted, loop, playsInline). Will play in normal browsers.
verified_checks.hero_products_btn_text: Se sessions, beats og dine andre muligheder (exact match)
verified_checks.hero_products_btn_scroll: Scrolls to #session — section top within viewport after click

owner_section.position: between Gallery and Reviews — confirmed in DOM order
owner_section.title: Manden bag.

verified_checks.section_indices: Reviews=06 and Contact=07 confirmed in DOM (h2 texts in expected order; index numerals rendered above each title per SectionHeader/Owner markup)

aesthetic_verdicts.owner_section: Looks intentional and editorial — the white-background portrait of Patrick (in a black DSQUARED2 hoodie) framed on the dark page reads as a deliberate highlight card. High contrast with the surrounding bg-ink, the yellow 'BLOWUP · HEDEHUSENE' tag pinned to the bottom-left of the frame ties it to the brand language, and the 4/5 aspect ratio keeps it tall and balanced next to the 'Manden bag.' title. The square (rounded-none) frame is consistent with the brutalist aesthetic. Mobile stack (photo above text) reads cleanly. Verdict: GOOD / intentional.
aesthetic_verdicts.socials_band: Subtle and tidy — small 'FØLG BLOWUP' display headline on the left and four compact dark pill-buttons with yellow icons on the right. The band height (~py-12) is restrained and does not compete with Contact above or the giant outlined BLOWUP wordmark in the footer below. On mobile it stacks into a clean 2-col grid. Verdict: GOOD, appropriately understated.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Hero <video> tag has no preload hint; consider preload="auto" or metadata to encourage playback start in browsers that defer autoplay. Not blocking.
Minor: Socials uses lucide Music2 icon as a TikTok stand-in; visually fine but a dedicated TikTok glyph would be more semantically accurate. Not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all change set: hero video swap, Owner/Patrick section (id=om, idx 05), Socials band after Contact, header brand 'BLOWUP studio', section titles (Gallery 'Oplev studiet.', Reviews 'Hvad artisterne siger.' idx 06, Contact idx 07), removed socials from Footer and from Contact CTA card. Mobile nav has 'Om'. Known out-of-scope: Spotify embed locale error from third-party CDN.
